title: Clear Glass Vase, Cylinder Glass Vases, Tall Flower Vase, Modern Ribbed Vases for Living Room, Coffee Table, Dining Table, Office, Wedding, Shelf, 30 CM
features: Elegant Ribbed Vase: Perfect for displaying flower bouquets, this glass vase adds a touch of sophistication and simplicity. Ideal for the living room, dining table, mantelpiece, coffee table, or porch

Modern Elegance:A bouquet in this glass vase instantly brightens your space, adding style and charm to your home. Its timeless design complements modern, farmhouse, minimalist, boho, or classic interiors effortlessly

Decorative Glass Vase: With its tall, elegant design and wide opening, this clear vase is perfect for long-stemmed flowers like roses, lilies, and gladioli, adding structure and sophistication to any space

Exceptional Craftsmanship: Made from 100% premium soda-lime glass, this ribbed vase is sturdy, leak-proof, and easy to clean. Expertly handcrafted, its textured finish adds a touch of modern elegance to any space

Perfect Gift: This handmade glass vase is a stunning gift for friends and family, perfect for home décor, weddings, housewarmings, and businesses. Ideal for occasions like birthdays, Christmas, New Year, Thanksgiving, Valentine’s Day, and Mother’s Day
